title: Women in Tech Bootcamp Scholarship
description: A fully funded six-week digital skills bootcamp for women founders and career switchers.
process: Submit a short motivation statement, your CV, and a brief profile.
eligibility: Women aged 18+ who want to build digital skills and grow professionally.

faqs.a: Women across Africa who are eager to grow their digital and business skills.

title: Founder Fellowship for Women Entrepreneurs
description: A leadership fellowship helping women founders sharpen strategy and grow their businesses.
process: Complete the short application and share your business vision.
eligibility: Women founders with an operating business and growth goals.

faqs.q: Is this available for early-stage founders?
faqs.a: Yes, the fellowship is designed for early to growth-stage founders.

title: Grant for Community Impact Projects
description: Support for women-led community projects that create strong local impact.
process: Share your project plan, budget, and expected impact.
eligibility: Women-led organizations or community projects with measurable impact.

faqs.a: Projects that directly support women, families, or local community growth.
